name: Plank
steps: Open the crafting grid.
Place 1 {material} log in any slot.
Collect 4 {material} planks from the result slot.

name: Stone
steps: Open the furnace.
Place 1 cobblestone in the top slot.
Add fuel to the bottom slot.
Wait for it to smelt.
Collect the stone from the result slot.

name: Copper Ingot
steps: Open the furnace.
Place 1 copper ore in the top slot.
Add fuel to the bottom slot.
Wait for it to smelt.
Collect the copper ingot from the result slot.

name: Iron Ingot
steps: Open the furnace.
Place 1 iron ore in the top slot.
Add fuel to the bottom slot.
Wait for it to smelt.
Collect the iron ingot from the result slot.

name: Crafting Table
steps: Open inventory crafting
Place 4 wood planks in a square

name: Stick
steps: Open inventory crafting
Place 2 wood planks vertically

name: Chest
steps: Open crafting table
Place 8 planks in all slots except the center

name: Furnace
steps: Open crafting table
Place 8 cobblestones around the edges

name: Smoker
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 1 furnace in the center slot.
Place 1 log above, below, left, and right of the furnace.
Fill the four side slots around the furnace with logs.
Collect the smoker from the result slot.

name: Blast Furnace
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 iron ingots across the top row.
Place 1 iron ingot on the left and right of the middle row.
Place 1 furnace in the center slot.
Place 3 smooth stones across the bottom row.
Collect the blast furnace from the result slot.

name: Shield
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 1 iron ingot in the top-middle slot.
Place 3 planks across the middle row.
Place 2 planks in the bottom-left and bottom-right slots.
Place 1 planks in the bottom-middle slot.

name: Campfire
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 sticks across the top row.
Place 1 coal in the center slot.
Place 3 logs across the bottom row.
Collect the campfire from the result slot.

name: Torch
steps: Open the crafting grid.
Place 1 coal in the center slot.
Place 1 stick in the bottom-middle slot.
Collect 4 torches from the result slot.

name: Ladder
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 sticks vertically on the left column.
Place 3 sticks vertically on the right column.
Place 1 stick in the center slot.
Collect 3 ladders from the result slot.

name: Stair
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} in the bottom row.
Place 2 {material} in the middle row on the left side.
Place 1 {material} in the top-left slot.
Collect 4 stairs from the result slot.

name: Door
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} in the left column.
Place 3 {material} in the middle column.
Collect 3 doors from the result slot.

name: Trapdoor
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} in the top row.
Place 3 {material} in the middle row.
Collect 2 trapdoors from the result slot.

name: Boat
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 1 {material} in the bottom-middle slot.
Place 2 {material} in the bottom-left and bottom-right slots.
Place 2 {material} in the middle-left and middle-right slots.
Collect the boat from the result slot.

name: Sign
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} in the top row.
Place 3 {material} in the middle row.
Place 1 stick in the bottom-middle slot.
Collect 3 signs from the result slot.

name: Fence
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 2 {material} in the left and right slots of the middle row.
Place 2 sticks in the center slots of the top and middle rows.
Collect 3 fences from the result slot.

name: Slab
steps: Open the crafting grid.
Place 3 {material} in a horizontal row.
Collect 6 slabs from the result slot.

name: Pressure Plate
steps: Open the crafting grid.
Place 2 {material} side by side in a horizontal row.
Collect the pressure plate from the result slot.

name: Boots
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 1 {material} in the left and right slots of the middle row.
Place 1 {material} in the left and right slots of the bottom row.
Collect the boots from the result slot.

name: Leggings
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} in the top row.
Place 1 {material} in the left and right slots of the middle row.
Place 1 {material} in the left and right slots of the bottom row.
Collect the leggings from the result slot.

name: Chestplate
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} in the top row.
Place 1 {material} in the left and right slots of the middle row.
Place 3 {material} in the bottom row.
Collect the chestplate from the result slot.

name: Helmet
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} in the top row.
Place 1 {material} in the top-left and 1 {material} in the top-right of the middle row.
Collect the helmet from the result slot.

name: Sword
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 1 {material} in the top-middle slot.
Place 1 {material} in the center slot.
Place 1 stick in the bottom-middle slot.
Collect the sword from the result slot.

name: Pickaxe
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 3 {material} across the top row.
Place 1 stick in the center slot.
Place 1 stick in the bottom-middle slot.
Collect the pickaxe from the result slot.

name: Axe
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 2 {material} in the top-left and top-middle slots.
Place 1 {material} in the middle-left slot.
Place 1 stick in the center and bottom-middle slots.
Collect the axe from the result slot.

name: Shovel
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 1 {material} in the top-middle slot.
Place 1 stick in the center slot.
Place 1 stick in the bottom-middle slot.
Collect the shovel from the result slot.

name: Hoe
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 2 {material} in the top-left and top-middle slots.
Place 1 stick in the center slot.
Place 1 stick in the bottom-middle slot.
Collect the hoe from the result slot.

name: Spear
steps: Open the crafting table.
Place 1 {material} in the top-corner slot.
Place 1 stick in the center slot.
Place 1 stick in the opposite bottom-corner slot.
Collect the spear from the result slot.
